headline: MuleRun — The AI Agent That Gets Work Done
snippet: Wei Chen Independent Developer Absolutely mind-blowing! I'm on my knees. The level of detail in the output would take a human at least half a month to produce manually. This is a true game-changer. Ty
full_text: Wei Chen Independent Developer Absolutely mind-blowing! I'm on my knees. The level of detail in the output would take a human at least half a month to produce manually. This is a true game-changer. Tyler Brooks Startup Founder I tried MuleRun today and it genuinely shook me. The experience felt surreal — like questioning reality. This technology is terrifying in the best way. A lot of jobs are about to change. Raj Patel Product Manager I stayed up until 2 AM last night and didn't even notice the time flying by ── this tool is that addictive! I'm now building a story-driven game with a marketing friend using it. Absolutely delightful. Ananya Sharma Markting Holy cow, this thing is insanely useful! I just handed it a data spreadsheet and it came back with a beautiful analysis PPT, complete with key conclusions and a future roadmap. Pure magic. Kenji Mori Software Engineer He's so smart! Cute and incredibly capable — I'd genuinely pay for this. The AI understands context better than most ...
